key_points: Belgium has three linguistic communities: Dutch, French and German
Belgium amended its constitution between 1970 and 1993 to resolve conflicts
Sri Lanka experienced ethnic conflict due to majoritarian policies
Power sharing ensures political stability and reduces conflict
Federal systems are examples of vertical power sharing
examples: Belgium created community governments to represent language groups
Brussels has a separate government with equal representation
Reserved constituencies in India ensure representation of weaker sections
Coalition governments share power among political parties
formulas: Prudential Reason = Power sharing reduces conflict and maintains stability
Moral Reason = Power sharing reflects democratic values and participation
exam_tips: Understand how majoritarianism caused problems in Sri Lanka
Differentiate horizontal and vertical power sharing
Include examples from India in answers
